history.content:
<thought>
I am facing right at position (2,2) and the cell directly ahead is lava (L). To avoid it and move towards the goal at (4,4), I need to head downward. Turning right will make me face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at the top-left area of the map facing down. The goal G is at the bottom-right. I can move down twice, then turn left to face east, then move right twice to reach the goal. The next cell in front of me is (2,1) which is a floor cell. So I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at position (row 2, col 1) facing down. The cell directly ahead (row 3, col 1) is empty floor, so I can move forward safely. This will bring me closer to the goal at (row 3, col 3). After that, I will need to turn left to face east and then move twice to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 3, column 1, facing down (v). The goal is at (3,3) to my right. To move towards it, I need to face right. Turning left from down will orient me to the right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (row 3, col 1) facing right. The goal is at (row 3, col 3) directly to the right. The cell immediately in front of me (row 3, col 2) is empty, so I can move forward without hitting a wall or lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing right, and the goal cell is directly to its right. Moving forward will step onto the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
